programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep113: Lions of the Deep
programme.desc: In the past 50 years, sea lion populations have declined more than 80% along the North Pacific coast. Scientists at the University of British Columbia, and the Vancouver Aquarium, are working together to help save North America’s iconic and largest pinniped - the stellar sea lion.

programme.title: Lost In Java
programme.desc: A group of world-class professional big-wave surfers travel half-way around the world to attempt to surf a never before surfed 20 foot tube off the coast of Java in Indonesia. Former big-wave World Tour Champion Grant ‘Twiggy’ Baker from South Africa, Hawaiian’s Mark Healey and Billy Kemper along with Australian Ryan Hipwood and Tasmania’s Mikey Brennan, were locked in for the adventure of a lifetime.

programme.title: Xplash Ep103
programme.desc: Xplash brings you eye-popping water-related action from around the globe. Today we’ll soar with the North Kiteboarding Team, slackline across the treacherous gorge at Victoria Falls, and we begin this episode with gonzo wakeboarding in Sweden.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV Ep104: Tiger Sharks + Night Diving With Sharks + Blacktip Sharks
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV features Tiger Sharks, night diving with Sharks, how shark’s smell, how shark coloration works and introduces us to Blue Sharks.

programme.title: Liquid Edge Ep104
programme.desc: Liquid Edge is surfing barrels on Hawaii’s North Shore, making friends with sharks, enjoying epic waterfalls in Mexico, traveling to Indonesia with professional surfers, hanging ten with one of longboarding’s beauties...and it’s not surfing if you aren’t getting slammed, plus plenty more on Liquid Edge.

programme.title: Blue World Ep705: Endangered Angel Sharks + IMAX Filmmakers
programme.desc: Blue World searches for endangered Angel Sharks in California’s Channel Islands, then teams up with world-renown IMAX filmmakers Howard and Michele Hall to film sea turtles feeding in the Philippines.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep113: Lions of the Deep
programme.desc: In the past 50 years, sea lion populations have declined more than 80% along the North Pacific coast. Scientists at the University of British Columbia, and the Vancouver Aquarium, are working together to help save North America’s iconic and largest pinniped - the stellar sea lion.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Neverland
programme.desc: Neverland is a state of mind, a mountain pushed up from the ground by imagination. Anyone can go but most people have trouble with the simple directions: Follow your dreams.

programme.title: Sparks
programme.desc: Take a pow trip around the world and into the mind of Wolle Nyvelt to find out why his passion for snowboarding runs so deep. From his legendary tenure as a rider to his work shaping pow surfers with Asmo, Wolle has dedicated his life to the culture of sliding sideways. "Sparks is the exploration into what makes snowboarding so fun and exciting to us all. It’s an interpretation of our lifestyle; the culture of building boards, riding mountains, and the adventure of choosing this path.” - Wolle Nyvelt

programme.title: Äsmosphere
programme.desc: Äsmosphere is the surf-influenced creation of Wolfgang Nyvelt showcasing his craftsmanship and appreciation for the glide and the turns we take on snow. After 16 years of filming legendary video parts, freeriding is now at the forefront of Wolle’s mind.

programme.title: Inaka
programme.desc: ‘Inaka’ is a short film about Iwanai, ‘the hidden beauty’ of Hokkaido. Snowboarders Wolfgang Nyvelt, Garrett Warnick and Bode Merrill drop everything and head to the North Island of Japan in search of good times and backcountry powder. Filmed by Billabong ambassador and filmmaker Chris Burkard.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Optimistic?
programme.desc: For those who live to snowboard, climate change can present an impossible challenge or become a catalyst for creativity. It all depends on how you look at it. In the movie Optimistic?, Absinthe Films follows 15 riders as they each explore the effects of global warming. Timely. Innovative. Positive.

programme.title: Hillside Project - Prototyping in Mayrhofen
programme.desc: This past year, Louif Paradis and Harrison Gordon visited Wolle’s hometown of Mayrhofen to better understand the complex prototyping process and to see where Wolle carved his teeth as a snowboarder and a shaper. Filmed by David Vladyka Riding: Wolle Nyvelt Harrison Gordon Louif Paradis Victor Daviet

programme.title: Hillside Project - Rizumu
programme.desc: An intergenerational exploration of Japan in search of rhythm, flow, and incredibly deep snow. Each year Wolle Nyvelt and a select crew of snowboarders set out to explore new terrain and test different shapes within the Hillside Project Series. After being closed to travel for the last couple of years, Japan was the obvious choice. Needless to say, the crew composed of Wolle, Takaharu Nakai, Louif Paradis and Luke Lund scored. Featuring: Wolle Nyvelt, Takaharu Nakai, Louif Paradis, Luke Lund Filmed by David Vladyka

programme.title: Hillside Project - Äsmo Factory
programme.desc: Making boards at the Äsmo factory! Featuring Josh Dirksen, Max Buri and Wolfgang Nyvelt

programme.desc: With the Ghibli, Maserati advanced into a more affordable market segment. But the competition is strong. In addition: taking the Maserati GranCabrio MC on a cruise through the Alps.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Porsche Cayenne Turbo and the Range Rover Supercharged are big and have a lot of power, so that they could even take on sports cars. Also: with the Bentayga, Bentley presented the brand's first SUV model. And: the Jaguar F-Pace.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Porsche's 911 GTS closed the gap between the S and the GT3 in their sports car model range. Also: the Roding Roadster, a handcrafted lightweight sports car with technology by BMW at its core.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Porsche Cayenne Turbo and the Range Rover Supercharged are big and have a lot of power, so that they could even take on sports cars. Also: with the Bentayga, Bentley presented the brand's first SUV model. And: the Jaguar F-Pace.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: The S version of the Jaguar F-Pace is a tough competitor for Porsche Macan Turbo other rivals. Also: Audi launched its SQ7 as the most powerful diesel SUV on the market. And: the Bentley Bentayga, the first luxury class SUV in the world.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: With its extravagant design the Lexus NX200t definitely stands out. Infiniti, Nissan's luxury division, is more conservative in that regard. The QX30 features a classic Infiniti design with a curved bonnet. Also: the city SUV Mazda CX-3.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Ferrari's California T model heralded a new era for the Italian sports car manufacturer. After its facelift the T was the first Ferrari with a turbo engine since the iconic F40 which was built until 1992.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With their new DB 11, Aston Martin heads towards the future at full throttle. Also: after its facelift the Nissan GTR presented itself freshly streamlined and more powerful than ever. And: Lamborghini's V10 fighting bull, the Huracán.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The German manufacturer Roding created a car that even outshined the Porsche GT3 with an impressive power/weight ratio. British makes like the Caterham 620 R, Lotus Elise or Radical RXC also showed what's in play in regards to lightweight sports cars.

programme.title: Discovering Rhodes - Part 2
programme.desc: In this second episode, we will visit the historic and picturesque Mandraki Harbour before exploring the natural attractions of Butterfly Valley and Seven Springs. Finally, we will visit the must-see archaeological sites that aren’t to be missed before leaving the island, the town and the Acropolis of Lindos.

programme.title: Alien Rising

programme.title: Domestic Hell

Bonds are tested; wills are broken; and, metal is forged. It's a tale of survival, trust, and darkness from the creators of Bloody Drama.

programme.title: Satan Claus

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E33 - Prince Edward and Sophie Rhys-Jones

programme.desc: Kia challenges Tom to a competition, whoever finds the most gold with one tank of gas wins - winner takes all! kwadventure

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E35 - Prince Charles At 50 Heir To Sadness
programme.desc: After Diana's death, everyone's attention turned to Charles, who was not only a widower and a dad but also next in line for the throne. This show takes a closer look at how he got along with his sons, his longtime love Camilla, and what his future might look like as King. Royal experts David Starkey and Anthony Holden share their insights.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E34 - Prince William And Prince Harry The Next Royal Generation
programme.desc: Prince William and Prince Harry, along with their friends, got as much media attention as today’s pop stars, fashion icons, and movie celebs. This documentary explores how this affected their personal lives and friendships, showcasing how they managed their fame alongside their royal responsibilities.

programme.title: Harry Meghan: A Very Modern Romance
programme.desc: Meghan Markle and Prince Harry share similar interests and seem like a perfect match. Both have faced tough times growing up but have come out on top. Now they're winning together. This hour-long special, featuring a chat with author Andrew Morton, explores the social backdrop that makes their bold marriage fit right in with today's British Royal Family.

programme.title: Cabin of Errors
programme.desc: When Peter and Nancy split up, their friends plot to bring them back together during a trip to a cabin. But things go hilariously wrong when Peter comes to the cabin with other intentions. A modern day romantic comedy farce.

programme.title: 1st Bite
programme.desc: Set on a tropical island in Thailand, the strange plight of a beleaguered chef who, while romancing a mysterious woman, discovers the diabolical Zen of cooking. Following a near death escape, he returns to Montreal and falls hard for the woman of his life who unfortunately craves only his cooking but not his loving. Worse still, strange things surfacing around him indicate that his journey to the Far East has deep, divine implications. The stage is set for him to take the 1st bite of true love and end the cycle of suffering for all involved.

programme.title: Making Out
programme.desc: A screenwriter and self-proclaimed hopeless romantic meets a beautiful actress and they decide to act out their ideal love scenarios. When real feelings start to jump off the page and become real will he tell her how he feels? They're in love, probably.

programme.title: Hot and Sweet

programme.title: Thirty the Series

programme.desc: A wrongfully accused ex-con hunts down the criminals behind a daring heist to clear his name and uncover the mastermind’s scheme.

programme.title: Night of the Living Dead

programme.title: Gung Ho

programme.title: Rage at Dawn
programme.desc: A special agent from Chicago is sent out west to bring in the notorious Reno brothers

programme.title: When God Gets Ready
programme.desc: People label, but God names. You don’t have to chase identity or earn worth, because you’ve always been called, loved, and set apart for something more.

programme.title: When God Says Let Go
programme.desc: Is your faith being tested? If you’ve been waiting on the details of what God has next, remember that God doesn’t give a test without a lesson first, so if He’s calling you to let go of something, you can trust He’s already provided you with what you’ll need to take that step.

programme.title: This Might Be My God Moment
programme.desc: Are you standing over a situation that’s too big for you? If you feel like your hope, logic, and options are at a dead end, pay attention because this might be your “my God moment.”

programme.title: All Those Times You Didn’t See
programme.desc: The efforts you make when no one’s watching are the ones God uses to shape you. Just because you don't see the outcome yet doesn’t mean He’s ignoring you; He's positioning you. Keep showing up while you wait.

programme.title: All You've Got To Do Is Don't
programme.desc: We all find ourselves in seasons when we feel like we don’t have what it takes, and we don’t know what to do. But don’t be afraid or discouraged, because God isn’t late — He’s working according to His timing. Don’t lose hope, and don’t give up

programme.title: The God Of Pieces
programme.desc: The devil wants to keep you overwhelmed by your situation, but God wants to show you how to deal with it piece by piece. And as you learn to praise God for the piece you have, you’ll experience the peace you’ve been praying for.

programme.desc: Martín, es un editor que trabaja en un canal de televisión cuyo dueño es el señor Battaglia.

programme.title: Catemaco: Magia y Misterio
programme.desc: Una familia normal va de vacaciones a Catemaco, Michoacan un pueblo famoso y pintoresco en Mexico. Todo marcha bien hasta que son atacados por criminales, el padre sobrevive, y con ayuda del brujo mayor del pueblo cobra venganza.

programme.title: Aquel Septiembre
programme.desc: En "Septiembre" la vida de Antonio se ve sacudida con el regreso de Carolina, su mejor amigo a quien no ve desde hace 6 años. Esta vez sus planes cambian, el amor comienza a juega con su corazón mientras Julián le hace descubrir los celos que nunca pensó encontraría. Carolina encuentra en Antonio a su mejor confidente y desahogo, sin sabiendo el daño que le hace al decirle todo lo que siente por Julián y hablando con él sobre su confusión por enamorarse de un amigo. Y es que pobre Antonio está enamorado de Carolina, su mejor amiga.

programme.title: [object Object]
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Distopia
programme.desc: Impulsados por antiguos planes esotéricos, poderosas elites ocultas emplean armas bioquímicas, guerra psicológica, cuarentenas mundiales, e incluso magia negra para controlar el futuro de la humanidad y alcanzar la inmortalidad

programme.title: Er Relajo Del Loro
programme.desc: Un loro que tras ser vendido a unos traficantes de animales cuando era pequeño, va pasando de dueño en dueño durante toda su vida y cambiando su nombre de acuerdo a su propietario, mirando frente a sus ojos la evolución de Venezuela durante 50 años (1950/2000).

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.
